ddls:
CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "uuid" TEXT /* Unique key of the log */,
  "filter_risk_level" TEXT /* Event's top level filter risk */,
  "host_name" TEXT /* Computer name of the client host */,
  "interested_host" TEXT /* Endpoint hostname */,
  "shost" TEXT /* Source hostname */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product generating the log */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the log was created */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Categorization of the log severity (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of security event (e.g., intrusion, malware detection) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  "source_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the source host */,
  "destination_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the destination host */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string if applicable */,
  "geolocation" TEXT /* Geolocation data (e.g., country, city) */,
  "threat_score" INTEGER /* Numerical score indicating the severity of the threat */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., pending, triggered, resolved) */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the security product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the product */,
  "support_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for support */,
  "vendor" TEXT /* Vendor of the security product */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was installed */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date of the last update or patch */,
  "license_key" TEXT /* License key for the product */,
  "license_expiry" TEXT /* Expiry date of the license */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the product (e.g., active, inactive, decommissioned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "product_access" TEXT /* Products the user has access to */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, locked, suspended) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_product_access FOREIGN KEY ("product_access") REFERENCES products ("product_name")
)
